articles.summary: Like it or not, ChatGPT and Perplexity are part of your customers' buying journey. Does SEO still matter? Sure. Is it the entire picture? No.

articles.title: TIKTOK SIGNS AGREEMENT TO CREATE NEW US JOINT VENTURE, MEMO SAYS
articles.summary: TikTok's US operations will soon be housed in a new joint venture named TikTok USDS Joint Venture LLC. The company has signed agreements with Oracle, Silver Lake, and Abu Dhabi-based MGX. The deal's closing date is on January 22. Oracle will serve as the 'trusted security partner' in charge of auditing and validating that TikTok complies with agreed-upon national security terms.

articles.title: WARNER DEMANDS LARRY ELLISON'S PERSONAL GUARANTEE IN PARAMOUNT BID
articles.summary: Warner has urged shareholders to reject Paramount's hostile takeover bid due to concerns about the financing. Paramount is using an Ellison family trust to backstop the deal - Warner wants Larry Ellison to give a stronger personal guarantee that he is fully committed to the bid. Paramount isn't likely to raise its bid. Instead, it is engaging with shareholders and gathering feedback on its tender about what it needs to do.

articles.title: THE INSIDE STORY OF SPACEX'S HISTORIC ROCKET LANDING THAT CHANGED LAUNCH FOREVER
articles.summary: SpaceX launched the Orbcomm-2 mission on an upgraded version of its Falcon 9 rocket on December 21, 2015. That night, the company landed the first stage for the first time. This article tells the inside story of the landing, starting with the disintegration of a Falcon 9 rocket in June 2015, the first time a Falcon 9 had been lost in flight.

articles.title: TRUMP COMMITS TO MOON LANDING BY 2028, FOLLOWED BY A LUNAR OUTPOST TWO YEARS LATER
articles.summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order outlining NASA's policy objectives for the next three years a couple of hours after a judge formally swore Jared Isaacman as the agency's administrator. The executive order states that the country must pursue a space policy that will extend the reach of human discovery, secure the nation's vital economic and security interests, unleash commercial development, and lay the foundation for a new space age. There are no concrete plans to send humans to Mars in the document. There's also a lack of reference to space science. An overview of the contents of the executive order is available in the article.

articles.title: GO FROM HYPE TO VALUE. UNLOCK GENAI ROI WITH THIS EXCLUSIVE COURSE
articles.summary: 95% of AI pilots fail, yet executives are under pressure to move quickly. This exclusive course [9] from You.com [9], featuring Field CTO Adam Oliner, provides a roadmap to transform your organization into a super-intelligent workforce. You'll learn how to identify where AI can cut costs and drive value, and uncover strategies to scale adoption beyond pilots.

articles.title: Get access to the course here.
INTRODUCING GPT-5.2-CODEX
articles.summary: GPT‑5.2-Codex is a version of GPT‑5.2 optimized for agentic coding. It features improvements in long-horizon work through context compaction, stronger performance on large code changes, improved performance in Windows environments, and significantly stronger cybersecurity capabilities. The model is now available in all Codex surfaces for paid ChatGPT users. OpenAI is working towards safely enabling the model for API users in the coming weeks.

articles.title: CLOUDFLARE'S LATEST OUTAGE PROVES DANGERS OF GLOBAL CONFIGURATION CHANGES
articles.summary: Cloudflare's most recent outage was caused by a seemingly innocent but global configuration change. The incident shows why the largest systems in the world will have to implement safer ways to roll out configs. Implementing gradual rollouts for all configuration files is a lot of work, so it doesn't make sense unless the stability of systems is more important than fast iteration. Smaller companies and products probably won't need to implement staged configuration rollouts because the infrastructure work slows down product development.

articles.title: LET A THOUSAND SOCIETIES BLOOM
articles.summary: One of the recurring ideological themes of the last few decades has been the idea of creating entirely new communities, cultures, cities, and even countries. In this world of a thousand nations, people would be able to choose the communities that best fit their values. These ideas inspired Vitalik Buterin to create Zuzalu, an experimental pop-up city in Montenegro, in 2023. This post provides an updated picture of the space, detailing what Buterin has learned since 2023, and sketches out a world that the movement could be driving towards.

articles.title: LEVELS.FYI WRAPPED
articles.summary: Levels.fyi started in 2017 to make compensation information clear and easy to compare. Millions of professionals today rely on its shared salary data to better understand pay across roles, companies, and levels. This report details how compensation has evolved, the highest paying companies, high-level compensation trends, the top paying locations, and more.
